name: Blackwing - Steam the Cloak
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＦ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ブラックフェザー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>隠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>れ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>蓑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>みの</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のスチーム
name_jp_tl: Black Feather - Steam the Invisibility Cloak
desc: If this face-up card leaves the field: Special Summon 1 "Steam Token" (Aqua/WIND/Level 1/ATK 100/DEF 100). If this card is in your GY: You can Tribute 1 monster; Special Summon this card from the GY. You can only use this effect of "Blackwing - Steam the Cloak" once per Duel. If this card Summoned this way is used as Synchro Material, all other Synchro Materials must be "Blackwing" monsters.
mnst_eff: If this face-up card leaves the field: Special Summon 1 "Steam Token" (Aqua/WIND/Level 1/ATK 100/DEF 100). If this card is in your GY: You can Tribute 1 monster; Special Summon this card from the GY. You can only use this effect of "Blackwing - Steam the Cloak" once per Duel. If this card Summoned this way is used as Synchro Material, all other Synchro Materials must be "Blackwing" monsters.

If this card Summoned this way is used as Synchro Material, all other Synchro Materials must be "Blackwing" monsters.

sets.set: Dragons of Legend: The Complete Series

jp_sets.set: Collectors Pack: Duelist of Legend Version

action: Activates if it leaves the field
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
